docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,515.00 FILED BY MAROTTA FANNIE AS TO DEFENDANT SCHUBERT GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SCHUBERT GEORGE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAROTTA FANNIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SCHUBERT GEORGE DEFT TO TRIM TREE BRANCHES HANGING IN PLTF'S YARD BY 2/29/92, PROVIDED TREEE WILL NOT BE INJURED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
